code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut prefix: List<Int> = []
  mut running = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    running = running + v
    prefix = list.push(prefix, running)
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < prefix.len()
    let v = match prefix.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
